@t<error-page-help-line>: If the issue persists, please contact the site administrator.
@t<home-description>: A calm, modern dental clinic for checkups, smile care, and everyday oral health.

@t<home_meta.description>: Discover Dr. Zaid Rayan's dental clinic website with modern care, preventive treatments, and a calm patient-first experience.

doctor.description>: The clinic is designed to keep every visit straightforward, calm, and clearly explained. Patients get honest guidance, modern treatment planning, and care that respects both comfort and long-term results.
doctor.point_1>: Clear explanations before every treatment so patients always know what comes next.
doctor.point_2>: A gentle, patient-first approach focused on comfort and trust.
doctor.point_3>: Modern dental care built around healthy function and confident smiles.
doctor.title>: Personal dental care built around comfort and clarity.

footer.note>: Simple, calm, and focused on healthy smiles.

hero.description>: Thoughtful dental care for routine checkups, smile improvements, and treatment plans that feel clear from the first conversation.

highlight_1.description>: Regular exams and preventive care to keep problems small and smiles healthy.

highlight_2.description>: Every step is explained in plain language so treatment feels calm and easy to follow.

highlight_3.description>: Personalized plans shaped around your needs, priorities, and smile goals.

hero.title>: Healthy smiles start with calm, precise care.

services.description>: A focused set of dental services designed for prevention, restoration, and confident everyday care.

item_1.description>: Routine examinations, cleanings, and early guidance to protect long-term oral health.

item_2.description>: Careful restorative treatments that support comfort, function, and natural-looking results.

item_3.description>: Cosmetic smile improvements designed to look clean, balanced, and natural.

item_4.description>: Treatment plans shaped around the patient, from first consultation to follow-up.

services.title>: Simple dental services that cover the care most patients need.

visit.description>: The clinic experience is kept simple so patients can move from consultation to treatment with confidence.

step_1.description>: Start with a calm conversation about your needs, concerns, and treatment goals.

step_2.description>: Receive a clear explanation of findings and a treatment path that makes sense for you.

step_3.description>: Move forward with care that prioritizes comfort, precision, and confident follow-up.

visit.title>: A smooth experience from first conversation to follow-up.

@t<not-found-page-description>: The page you're looking for no longer exists. Perhaps it got removed, or it's never been there.
